text: (2) The issue price shall not be less than the face value of the specified securities.
sentence_window:
PART VI: PRICING
73. (1) The issuer shall decide the issue price, in consultation with the lead manager(s), before
determining the record date, which shall be determined in consultation with the designated stock
exchange. (2) The issue price shall not be less than the face value of the specified securities. (3) The issuer shall disclose the issue price in the letter of offer filed with the Board and the stock
exchange(s). 33

--- PAGE 34 ---
PART VII: ISSUANCE CONDITIONS AND PROCEDURE
Reservations
74.
